chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A permit issued under this subchapter must:
contain the name of the applicant;
be dated and signed by the director of the department or a designated agent;
state the make and model of the portable building unit or units to be transported over the highways;
state the make and model of the towing vehicle;
state the combined length and width of the portable building unit or units and towing vehicle; and
state each highway over which the portable building unit or units are to be moved.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A permit is valid if it is substantially in the form provided by this section.

history.raw: Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 84, eff. September 1, 2011.
